title: Nana Nancy is Dead
description: Youngest granddaughter confidently announces that Great Nana Nancy is dead after spotting an old family wedding photo, prompting Pa to loudly clarify that his mother is very much alive.
alt: In the living room, a granddaughter points at a family photo of Great Nana Nancy and says, 'That's Great Nana Nancy. She's dead.' Pa shouts from the couch, 'My mom is NOT dead!' while Dad stands nearby looking stunned.
